theorem: APF charged-lepton trace-vector source gate and QED codomain declaration
claim: v40 closes the charged-lepton source-gate obstruction and pole-codomain declaration, but does not claim physical charged-lepton export.

new_closed.trace_vector_source_gate: T_l must be supplied by a source-independent APF trace theorem
new_closed.omega_equivalence: T_l closure is equivalent to closing Omega_l or an APF-native replacement theorem
new_closed.inverse_trace_vector_forbidden: T_l=(Z nu R)^(-1) O_l^S cannot define the APF source vector

gate_status.G1_CODOMAIN_DECLARED: closed for pole codomain; running codomains deferred
gate_status.G2_TRANSPORT_MAP: blocked at source: T_l not supplied; v39 operator inherited
gate_status.G3_CONSTANTS_LEDGER: internal operator ledger inherited; QED constants deferred for running codomains
gate_status.G4_COVARIANCE: trace covariance deferred until T_l exists
gate_status.G5_NO_SMUGGLING: pass for v40: inverse charged-lepton trace vector forbidden
gate_status.G6_RESIDUAL_CHANNELS: pass as obstruction: T_l/Omega_l/QED channels named

promotion.before: charged leptons: P_route^coefficient_closed / trace vector and QED scheme export open
promotion.after: charged leptons: P_source_gate^T_l + P_codomain^pole_ready / not exported
